"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\StealthAgent2D.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\phrav\scoop\apps\gcc\current\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\StealthAgent2D.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\StealthAgent2D.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\phrav\scoop\apps\gcc\current\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\StealthAgent2D.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o StealthAgent2D.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libStealthAgent2D.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\StealthAgent2D.dir\linkLibs.rsp
